mapper.select:
SELECT U.USER_ID ,U.USER_NM ,U.CO_ID ,C.CO_CD ,C.CO_NM ,U.DEPT_ID ,D.DEPT_NM ,PD.DEPT_NM AS PARENT_DEPT_NM ,U.JBPS_NM ,U.AUTHRT_ID ,A.AUTHRT_NM ,U.USER_TELNO ,U.USE_YN ,U.MEMO_CN ,DATE_FORMAT(U.REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS REG_DT FROM USER_INFO U LEFT JOIN AUTHRT_INFO A ON U.AUTHRT_ID = A.AUTHRT_ID LEFT JOIN CO_INFO C ON U.CO_ID = C.CO_ID LEFT JOIN DEPT_INFO D ON U.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN DEPT_INFO PD ON D.UP_DEPT_ID = PD.DEPT_ID WHERE 1=1 AND U.USER_ID = #{userId} AND U.USER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userNm}, '%') AND U.CO_ID = #{coId} AND U.DEPT_ID = #{deptId} AND U.AUTHRT_ID = #{authrtId} AND U.USE_YN = #{useYn}
AND U.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
AND U.USER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
AND U.REG_DT BETWEEN #{sDate} AND DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(#{eDate}, '%Y-%m-%d'), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
ORDER BY U.REG_DT DESC

SELECT U.USER_ID ,U.USER_ENPSWD ,U.USER_NM ,U.CO_ID ,C.CO_CD ,C.CO_NM ,U.DEPT_ID ,U.JBPS_NM ,U.AUTHRT_ID ,A.AUTHRT_NM ,U.USE_YN FROM USER_INFO U LEFT JOIN AUTHRT_INFO A ON U.AUTHRT_ID = A.AUTHRT_ID LEFT JOIN CO_INFO C ON U.CO_ID = C.CO_ID WHERE U.USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT CO_ID ,CO_NM ,CO_TELNO ,USE_YN FROM CO_INFO WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY CO_NM ASC
SELECT AUTHRT_ID ,AUTHRT_NM ,AUTHRT_EXPLN FROM AUTHRT_INFO ORDER BY SORT_SEQ ASC
SELECT D.DEPT_ID ,D.CO_ID ,D.DEPT_NM ,D.UP_DEPT_ID ,D.SORT_SEQ FROM DEPT_INFO D WHERE D.USE_YN = 'Y' AND D.CO_ID = #{coId} ORDER BY IFNULL(D.UP_DEPT_ID, ''), D.SORT_SEQ ASC, D.DEPT_NM ASC

choose.when:
WITH RECURSIVE DEPT_TREE AS ( SELECT D.DEPT_ID FROM DEPT_INFO D WHERE D.USE_YN = 'Y' AND D.CO_ID = #{coId} AND D.DEPT_ID = #{deptId} UNION ALL SELECT C.DEPT_ID FROM DEPT_INFO C INNER JOIN DEPT_TREE P ON C.UP_DEPT_ID = P.DEPT_ID WHERE C.USE_YN = 'Y' AND C.CO_ID = #{coId} ) SELECT U.USER_ID ,U.USER_NM ,U.CO_ID ,U.DEPT_ID ,D.DEPT_NM ,D.UP_DEPT_ID ,D.SORT_SEQ ,U.JBPS_NM ,U.USER_TELNO FROM USER_INFO U LEFT JOIN DEPT_INFO D ON D.DEPT_ID = U.DEPT_ID WHERE U.USE_YN = 'Y' AND U.CO_ID = #{coId} AND U.DEPT_ID IN (SELECT DEPT_ID FROM DEPT_TREE)
AND (U.USER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR U.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR IFNULL(D.DEPT_NM, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY IFNULL(D.SORT_SEQ, 9999) ASC, U.USER_NM ASC, U.USER_ID ASC

mapper.select: SELECT U.USER_ID ,U.USER_NM ,U.CO_ID ,C.CO_CD ,C.CO_NM ,U.DEPT_ID ,D.DEPT_NM ,PD.DEPT_NM AS PARENT_DEPT_NM ,U.JBPS_NM ,U.AUTHRT_ID ,A.AUTHRT_NM ,U.USER_TELNO ,U.USE_YN ,U.MEMO_CN ,DATE_FORMAT(U.REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS REG_DT FROM USER_INFO U LEFT JOIN AUTHRT_INFO A ON U.AUTHRT_ID = A.AUTHRT_ID LEFT JOIN CO_INFO C ON U.CO_ID = C.CO_ID LEFT JOIN DEPT_INFO D ON U.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN DEPT_INFO PD ON D.UP_DEPT_ID = PD.DEPT_ID WHERE U.CO_ID = #{coId} AND U.USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT D.DEPT_ID ,D.CO_ID ,D.DEPT_NM ,D.UP_DEPT_ID ,PD.DEPT_NM AS PARENT_DEPT_NM ,D.SORT_SEQ FROM DEPT_INFO D LEFT JOIN DEPT_INFO PD ON D.UP_DEPT_ID = PD.DEPT_ID WHERE D.CO_ID = #{coId} AND D.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY IFNULL(D.UP_DEPT_ID, ''), D.SORT_SEQ ASC, D.DEPT_NM ASC
